route.description: Current Expo Router route for sherpa-voice

asr-ui.description: Visibility of the main ASR screen controls

asr-benchmark-ui.description: Route, mode, and control visibility for the ASR benchmark screen
asr-benchmark-ui.expression: JSON.stringify((function(){ const page = globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.getPageState?.() || {}; return { route: page.route || null, mode: page.mode || null, selectedModelId: page.selectedModelId || null, recorderIsRecording: page.recorderIsRecording ?? null, recorderDurationMs: page.recorderDurationMs ?? null, resultsCount: page.resultsCount ?? 0, sampleTabVisible: !!globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.findFiberByTestId?.('asr-benchmark-mode-sample'), liveTabVisible: !!globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.findFiberByTestId?.('asr-benchmark-mode-live'), runSelectedVisible: !!globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.findFiberByTestId?.('asr-benchmark-run-selected'), startLiveVisible: !!globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.findFiberByTestId?.('asr-benchmark-start-live'), stopLiveVisible: !!globalThis.__AGENTIC__?.findFiberByTestId?.('asr-benchmark-stop-live') }; })())
